Our Heritage

Our Story

Mandi King Restaurant was born from a deep love for Yemeni traditions and a desire to share its unparalleled flavors with the world. Our journey began with a simple vision: to bring the warmth, hospitality, and rich culinary heritage of Yemen. Every dish tells a story, passed down through generations, prepared with authentic techniques and the freshest ingredients, ensuring a truly unforgettable dining experience.

The heart of Yemeni cuisine lies in its time-honored cooking methods and communal dining culture. Mandi, our namesake dish, is a testament to this heritage – slow-cooked meats infused with smoky aromas, served atop fragrant rice. At Mandi King, we honor these traditions, crafting each dish with respect for its origins and a commitment to authentic taste. We are proud to be a custodian of this rich culinary legacy.

Slow-Cooked

Marinated 24hrs, cooked low and slow for fall-off-the-bone tenderness

Fresh Spices

Imported whole spices ground fresh daily in our kitchen

Master Chefs

Trained in traditional Yemeni and Arabian cooking techniques

Family Style

Generous portions designed to be shared and savoured together

Royal Menu

Our Authentic Yemeni Delights

Starter

Fattoush Salad

A refreshing mix of fresh vegetables, toasted bread, and a zesty sumac dressing.

AED 10

Hummus with Khubz

Creamy chickpea dip served with warm, freshly baked Yemeni bread.

AED 10

Mutabal

Smoky roasted eggplant dip, blended with tahini and lemon juice.

AED 10

Yemeni Lentil Soup

A hearty and warming soup, seasoned with traditional Yemeni spices.

AED 10

Salatah Baladi

A simple yet flavorful traditional Yemeni salad with fresh tomatoes, cucumbers, and herbs.

AED 12
Best Seller

Lamb Mandi

Tender, slow-cooked lamb served on a bed of aromatic basmati rice, infused with traditional spices.

AED 35

Chicken Mandi

Succulent roasted chicken, seasoned to perfection, served with fragrant Mandi rice.

AED 18
Chef's Pick

Mutton Madfoon

Juicy, underground-cooked mutton, incredibly tender and rich in flavor.

AED 40

Haneeth

Slow-roasted lamb, fall-off-the-bone tender, typically served with rice or bread.

AED 55
Sweet

Masoub

Flaky, layered honey cake, often served with black seed (Nigella Sativa).

AED 15

Luqaimat (Kunafa)

Sweet, crispy fried dough balls, often drizzled with date syrup. Available in Cream / Cheese / Pistachios.

AED 15
Why Choose Us

Experience Yemeni Culinary Excellence

At Mandi King Restaurant, every visit is more than just a meal; it's an immersive cultural experience. We pride ourselves on preserving the authenticity of Yemeni cuisine, offering a taste of tradition in every dish. Come and discover the rich flavors and warm hospitality that define our restaurant, where every detail is crafted to transport you to the heart of Yemen.

Authentically Yemeni

Recipes sourced from traditional Yemeni kitchens, unchanged for generations.

Halal Certified

All our meats and ingredients are 100% halal certified and ethically sourced.

Warm Hospitality

Yemeni tradition says a guest is a gift. We treat every table like royalty.

Free Delivery

Complimentary delivery on orders above AED 150 within a 10km radius.

Guest Reviews

What Our Guests Say

"

Mandi King delivers the most authentic Yemeni Mandi I've ever tasted outside of Yemen. The lamb was incredibly tender, and the rice was perfectly seasoned. A true taste of home!

Ahmad Umm Al Quwain, UAE
"

A must-visit for anyone in Umm Al Quwain looking for genuine Middle Eastern flavors. The atmosphere is lovely, and the Haneeth was absolutely divine. Highly recommended!

Ahmad Umm Al Quwain, UAE
"

From the warm welcome to the delicious Masoub, every aspect of our dining experience at Mandi King was exceptional. It's now our favorite Yemeni spot!

Guest UAE
